atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports right foot pain

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports the pain following a tennis injury, describing a fall and twisting of his foot

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports he wrapped the foot and iced it last night

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports some bruising and swelling in the foot and midfoot

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient denies numbness or tingling

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports the ibuprofen helps a little but wears off

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports playing tennis with friends and wants to get back to playing again

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Physical exam reveals bruising of the plantar and dorsal aspects of the right foot

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: There is associated swelling in the midfoot

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Palpation of the midfoot is tender

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Piano key testing of the first and second metatarsals is positive

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Capillary refill is less than 3 seconds in the right foot

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Dorsalis pedis pulse is strong

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The right foot is warm to the touch

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician reports a Lisfranc fracture.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician prescribes surgical intervention.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician orders an MRI.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician plans a follow-up appointment in one week.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician recommends physical therapy.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician instructs the patient with paperwork outlining surgical risks and recovery expectations.
